meaning: n.挤奶的妇女,在酪农场工作的女性
examples: A milkmaid was going to the market.
A milkmaid was on her way to market.
I just want to tell you how much I love your Milkmaid Tea.
The winning project, Milkmaid, is a quart size glass milk jug that can sense when your milk will go bad.
Vermeer's "Milkmaid" (c. 1660) is not shown beside an earthenware jug, nor is Rembrandt's "The Jewish Bride" (1667) hung beneath a wedding canopy.
